skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>~/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/healthcheck/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".</description>
    <location>~/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>~/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw/skills/weather/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>oc-intent-governor</name>
    <description>A pre-execution cognitive gate that analyzes instructions for clarity, ambiguity, and risk before execution to prevent hallucinations, vague task execution, incorrect assumptions, and premature multi-agent execution.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/OC-Intent-Governor/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>oc-system-evolver</name>
    <description>An autonomic system evolution and self-healing skill that enables OpenClaw to safely improve, repair, and maintain its own ecosystem through a hardened evolution layer with strict safety guarantees, controlled change mechanisms, and rollback protection.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/OC-System-Evolver/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>agent-watchdog</name>
    <description>REAL monitoring of running agents with actual observability. Detects stalls based on real session data, performs automatic recovery, and reports operational incidents to the error-learning-loop. Now includes real monitoring infrastructure, observable logs, and integration with OpenClaw ecosystem.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/agent-watchdog/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>error-learning-loop</name>
    <description>Capture errors and near-misses from the current task and from sub-agent handoff reports, perform semantic deduplication of incidents, convert them into actionable learnings, and promote guardrails into AGENTS.md and TOOLS.md so the main agent avoids repeating mistakes. Supports manual invocation and end-of-task wrap-up.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/error-learning-loop/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>long-prompt-orchestrator</name>
    <description>A production-ready Long Prompt Planner that automatically decomposes overly long/complex tasks into structured plans for main agent execution. Generates task DAGs with dependencies, resource estimates, and execution recommendations. Does NOT execute tasks or spawn sub-agents.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/long-prompt-orchestrator/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>salesforce-architect</name>
    <description>Production-ready skill for analyzing complex business processes, extracting requirements, producing Salesforce architecture decisions, generating FIT/GAP analysis, functional design documentation, data models, and validating architecture using official Salesforce documentation only.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/salesforce-architect/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>salesforce-code-auditor</name>
    <description>A production‑ready skill for progressive technical analysis of Salesforce codebases (Apex, LWC, Visualforce, Triggers, Flows, Metadata) with token‑efficient auditing.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/salesforce-code-auditor/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>tavily-web-search</name>
    <description>Production-ready Tavily Web Search skill with Firecrawl integration and full OpenClaw ecosystem integration (watchdog, error-learning-loop, janitor).</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/tavily-web-search/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>vector-memory</name>
    <description>Vector-based memory system for semantic storage and retrieval of memories using embeddings. Supports PostgreSQL with pgvector, auto-curation of MEMORY.md, and integration with agent-watchdog for long-running operations.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/vector-memory/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>workspace-janitor</name>
    <description>Safe workspace maintenance skill that scans, classifies, and proposes cleanup of obsolete files with user authorization.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/workspace-janitor/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>

Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: oc-intent-governor
resolvedSkills.description: A pre-execution cognitive gate that analyzes instructions for clarity, ambiguity, and risk before execution to prevent hallucinations, vague task execution, incorrect assumptions, and premature multi-agent execution.

resolvedSkills.name: oc-system-evolver
resolvedSkills.description: An autonomic system evolution and self-healing skill that enables OpenClaw to safely improve, repair, and maintain its own ecosystem through a hardened evolution layer with strict safety guarantees, controlled change mechanisms, and rollback protection.

resolvedSkills.name: agent-watchdog
resolvedSkills.description: REAL monitoring of running agents with actual observability. Detects stalls based on real session data, performs automatic recovery, and reports operational incidents to the error-learning-loop. Now includes real monitoring infrastructure, observable logs, and integration with OpenClaw ecosystem.

resolvedSkills.name: error-learning-loop
resolvedSkills.description: Capture errors and near-misses from the current task and from sub-agent handoff reports, perform semantic deduplication of incidents, convert them into actionable learnings, and promote guardrails into AGENTS.md and TOOLS.md so the main agent avoids repeating mistakes. Supports manual invocation and end-of-task wrap-up.

resolvedSkills.name: long-prompt-orchestrator
resolvedSkills.description: A production-ready Long Prompt Planner that automatically decomposes overly long/complex tasks into structured plans for main agent execution. Generates task DAGs with dependencies, resource estimates, and execution recommendations. Does NOT execute tasks or spawn sub-agents.

resolvedSkills.name: salesforce-architect
resolvedSkills.description: Production-ready skill for analyzing complex business processes, extracting requirements, producing Salesforce architecture decisions, generating FIT/GAP analysis, functional design documentation, data models, and validating architecture using official Salesforce documentation only.

resolvedSkills.name: salesforce-code-auditor
resolvedSkills.description: A production‑ready skill for progressive technical analysis of Salesforce codebases (Apex, LWC, Visualforce, Triggers, Flows, Metadata) with token‑efficient auditing.

resolvedSkills.name: tavily-web-search
resolvedSkills.description: Production-ready Tavily Web Search skill with Firecrawl integration and full OpenClaw ecosystem integration (watchdog, error-learning-loop, janitor).

resolvedSkills.name: vector-memory
resolvedSkills.description: Vector-based memory system for semantic storage and retrieval of memories using embeddings. Supports PostgreSQL with pgvector, auto-curation of MEMORY.md, and integration with agent-watchdog for long-running operations.

resolvedSkills.name: workspace-janitor
resolvedSkills.description: Safe workspace maintenance skill that scans, classifies, and proposes cleanup of obsolete files with user authorization.
